hooks.message: IAM modification detected. Verify you're targeting the correct AWS account and using least-privilege permissions.
Destructive AWS operation detected. Double-check resource identifiers and confirm this targets the intended environment.
Infrastructure teardown command detected. Confirm you want to destroy these resources — this may be irreversible.
Non-default region detected. Verify this is the intended deployment region for cost and latency considerations.
Writing to a file that may contain secrets. Never hardcode AWS access keys, secret keys, or session tokens. Use IAM roles, SSO, or AWS Secrets Manager instead.
